calendar.matters:
MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENTS, THE OFFICE OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS' MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE is denied. Respondents fail to show that the five year mandatory dismissal statute or any other dismissal for failure to prosecute statute supports, requires or permits dismissal of this case. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen Tedesco, of Littler Mendelson, Tel. 415.677.3134, for petitioners American Airporter Shuttle & Philip Achilles;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. Attorney, Stephen Tedesco's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD as to petitioners American Airporter Shuttle & Philip Achilles is granted. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR No. 6213, email: SLerschen@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
